title: 88% of AI Pilots Fail to Reach Production — But That's Not All on IT
note: IDC·Lenovo partnership research. Cited in Executive Summary and Section 1 (88% production failure rate, 171% ROI when successful).

title: MIT Report Finds 95% of AI Pilots Fail to Deliver ROI, Exposing GenAI Divide
note: Coverage of MIT 'The GenAI Divide: State of AI in Business 2025'. Cited in Sections 1 and 2 (95% ROI failure; 80% of pilot-to-production work is data engineering and governance).

title: The 2025 AI Agent Report: Why AI Pilots Fail in Production and the 2026 Integration Roadmap
note: Cited in Section 3 for the three structural traps: Brittle Connectors, Dumb RAG, and the Polling Tax.

title: Why Agentic AI Pilots Fail Production
note: Cited in Sections 3 and 4 for the three-category failure taxonomy: integration, governance, and use-case selection.

title: Fivetran Report Finds Nearly Half of Enterprise AI Projects Fail Due to Poor Data Readiness
note: AI & Data Readiness Survey 2025. Cited in Section 3: 41% lack real-time data access; 29% blocked by data silos; 42% experienced project delays due to data readiness issues.

title: The Root Causes of Failure for Artificial Intelligence Projects
note: Analysis of 2,400+ organizations. Cited in Section 1: 80.3% of AI projects fell short of business value targets.

title: Lack of AI-Ready Data Puts AI Projects at Risk
note: Cited in Sections 2 and 4: 85% of failed AI projects trace to data quality issues; only 12% of organizations hold data of sufficient quality for AI.
